summary: Wired Create.tsx with controlled inputs (title, date, emoji, color), handleSubmit with client-side validation (title non-empty, date > today), insertCountdown Supabase service, navigate('/') on success, error state on failure. Added supabase client, countdowns service, and text constants.
next_actions: Set VITE_SUPABASE_URL and VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY in .env before running the app
Create countdowns table in Supabase with RLS policies for session_id-based access
Build Home page (/) with CountdownList and EmptyState components
